title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A tutorial explaining AWS Identity and Access Management fundamentals, covering users, roles, policies, and the principle of least privilege. The video introduces IAM Access Analyzer and best practices such as avoiding hardcoded access keys and proper account setup procedures.
